forbidden_files: row-level quarantine or production DB mutation
implementation_commit_note: Commit 11c6315 is already pushed to origin/midstream_remediation and contains this packet plus a concurrent pytest.ini test-isolation change; history was not rewritten.
implementation_semantics: ObsV2Row rejects provenance JSON lacking payload_hash, parser_version, source identity, or station identity.
Active obs_v2 producers stamp deterministic sha256 payload identity over available row/source fields and label payload_scope when the hash is not a raw-provider byte hash.
WU source locators redact API keys and producer provenance uses non-secret Ogimet, Meteostat, or HKO source identity.
verify_truth_surfaces remains read-only and fails training readiness when training-allowed obs_v2 rows lack JSON provenance identity and dedicated payload columns are absent.
No production DB rows, schemas, views, upsert policy, quarantine policy, or P3/P4 consumers were changed.
tests_evidence: .venv/bin/python -m py_compile src/data/observation_instants_v2_writer.py scripts/backfill_obs_v2.py scripts/fill_obs_v2_dst_gaps.py scripts/fill_obs_v2_meteostat.py scripts/hko_ingest_tick.py scripts/verify_truth_surfaces.py tests/test_obs_v2_writer.py tests/test_hk_rejects_vhhh_source.py tests/test_truth_surface_health.py tests/test_backfill_scripts_match_live_config.py

Existing unsafe production rows remain fail-closed but are not mutated in this packet.
